Who We Are

A Home of Inspiration
in Nairobi

Mowlem Creek Premier School is a premium co-educational Christian private school based off Kangundo Road in Mowlem, Nairobi (Njiru Sub-County). We are a multicultural independent day school, proudly serving boys and girls from Kindergarten through to Junior Secondary School.

Our motto — "Rolling Out Your Potential" — reflects our belief that every cloud has a silver lining. We create environments that trigger every learner to unleash their best in every sphere: academic, creative, social and spiritual. We are a Christian School where the ethos of "care for one another" runs through all we do — yet proudly multi-faith and multicultural.

💪
Courage
Bold to try, resilient to persist
🤝

Care for one another — our core ethos
💡

Explore, express and create
🎯

Grounded in values and Christian faith

Our CBC Pathway

From Kindergarten to
Junior Secondary

We follow Kenya's CBC (2:6:3:3) — 2 years pre-school, 6 years primary, and now Junior Secondary. Every stage rolling out your potential.

🌱
Ages 3–6 · 2 Years

Pre-School / Kindergarten

Play-based learning developing language, early numeracy, creativity and social skills. Vibrant classrooms where curiosity is celebrated every single day.

PhonicsEarly NumeracyArts & CraftMusicMovement
📚
Grades 1–3 · Lower Primary

Lower Primary School

Core CBC strands through inquiry-based learning. Learners Explore, Express and Create as they build literacy, numeracy and environmental awareness.

EnglishKiswahiliMathematicsScienceSocial Studies
🎓
Grades 4–6 · Upper Primary

Upper Primary School

Deeper academic engagement with STEM, civic education, ICT and leadership. Preparation for the KCPE and the Junior Secondary transition.

STEMICTCRE/IRECreative ArtsPE
🏛
Grades 7–9 · Junior Secondary

Junior Secondary School

The newest CBC tier, now offered at Mowlem Creek. Critical thinking, digital literacy, leadership and preparation for Senior Secondary School.

Advanced STEMDigital LiteracyLeadershipCritical Thinking
Kindergarten
Practical Learning
Junior Secondary

Beyond the Classroom

Activities That Build
Whole Children

We offer wholesome education — not just book knowledge. Our co-curricular activities make the Mowlem Creek experience truly unforgettable.

🎭 Performing Arts
Dance, drama and music showcased at our Annual Graduation Ceremony
🏛 Civic Education
Memorable visits to Kenya's National Assembly — governance and leadership
👨‍🍳 Culinary Arts Club
Students learn cooking, food science and teamwork
🎤 Debate & Leadership
Developing confidence, critical thinking and public speaking
🎡 Fun Days & Outings
Enriching excursions — because happy learners are the best learners
🎨 Creative Arts
Visual arts, crafts and creative expression across all grades

Join Our Family

2026 Intake — Now Open

Kindergarten to Junior Secondary places available at both campuses. We inspire your child today to found a greater tomorrow.

📋 Required Documents

• Birth certificate & 2 passport photographs
• Previous school report / leaving certificate (if applicable)
• Parent / Guardian national ID
• Immunisation / health card

📍 Both Campuses Now Enrolling

Main Campus: Off Kangundo Road, Mowlem, Nairobi (Njiru Sub-County)

Ruai Hub — NEW 2026: Along Kagundo Road / Eastern By-Pass, Nairobi

How to Apply

1

Get in Touch

Call +254 700 080 010, email admin@mowlemcreekpremier.sc.ke or fill the form.

2

Collect & Submit Forms

Visit any campus to collect and complete the official admission application form.

3

Child Assessment

Friendly grade-appropriate session to understand your child's learning needs and readiness.

4

Offer & Registration

Written offer issued. Complete registration with documents and admission fee.

5

Welcome to Mowlem Creek! 🎉

Orientation for new pupils and parents. Your child begins rolling out their potential.

Request Information

Our admissions team contacts you within 24 hours.

Or call: +254 700 080 010  ·  admin@mowlemcreekpremier.sc.ke
